value_metric: the open history is provably not locked to a single Cloudflare Beta capability: a portable open engine (DuckDB) reading local Parquet rebuilds the key document, version, event, and signal counts with NO R2 SQL and NO R2 Data Catalog -- so recovery and analysis survive even if those Beta features are unavailable or withdrawn

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: offline independent verifier only; NOT wired to production; runs against the T027 open snapshot
cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.dev_dependency_added: duckdb==1.1.3 installed into the user's Python 3.9 user-site as an OFFLINE, independent open engine (different from the pyarrow writer) to cross-verify the Parquet; runtime/worker do not use it

cross_check_correction: T028's independent DuckDB rebuild surfaced that the T027 descriptive month-range end was mis-written as 2025-10; the true max month is 2026-07 (46-month count and all data/hashes were always correct). Corrected in the T027 evidence/spec docs and the T027 CHANGELOG line in this commit; the append-only T027 event is left immutable and this errata records the fix.
